name: lr
description: Thin Codex plugin shell that exposes lr skills for Linux remote ops.

interface.shortDescription: Expose the lr skill for SSH commands and file transfers.
interface.longDescription: Thin Codex plugin shell for the lr skill. The shared runtime stays in Python, and the skill handles single-agent or multi-agent usage.
defaultPrompt: Use the lr skill to test a host, run a command, upload or download files, or inspect audit logs.
